
# Minecrunch

Minecrunch a userscript-based enhancement suite for Minefun.io that gives players extra tools to improve their gameplay experience.

<div align="center">
<img src="https://github.com/EverlastingUc/Minecrunch/blob/main/Assets/%E3%82%AF%E3%83%A9%E3%83%B3%E3%83%81%20Minecrunch.png." width=300/>
</div>

## 🚀 Features

* **Custom Keystrokes**: Showing the key that youre pressing while gaming . 
* **10+ Custom Themes**: Access Many Custom Themes For The Game .
* **Smooth FPS**: Gives You A Better Smooth FPS .
* **Page Disable**: Disable Any Page While Gaming Like Q To Reactions etc . 
* **Press H To Clean Screen**: When You Pressed "H" It Will Automatically Clears Screen ( Best For Recording ) .

## 🛠 How to Use

1. Install [Minecrunch](http://tampermonkey.net/scripts.php) Using Tampermonkey.
2. Make Sure To Enable Allow User Scripts Option in the settings of the browser.
3. Make Sure To Enable The Game Mod.
4. Visit [Minefun.io](https://minefun.io/) And Then You Can See The Mod Automatically Added.
